utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Fully specified. 5) setup_services: Present with utilities and costs. Fully specified. 6) total_budget: Present with breakdown and totals. Fully specified. Counting strict inclusion by exact item names: only 5 exactly match (financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget). The 'property' item is mislabeled as 'selected_property'. If we require exact key name, it is not included; if we accept semantic match, it is included. These have to be fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details.' It emphasizes coverage and details, not exact key naming. Therefore, count it as included. Total included: 6 out of 6.
